content.en:
30,000 years after Ye Tian's retreat.

At this time, he had been in retreat in the Time True Pagoda for a full 300 million years, and with the help of countless top-level resources, he had been in retreat for 300 million years, what a long time.

this day.

Only then did Ye Tian finally cultivate the Nine Extremes True Body Technique to the Ninth Pole of the highest realm.

At this point, the True Spirit Chapter of the Nine Extremes True Body Technique can be regarded as a complete cultivation.

As for the Great Dao Chapter, Ye Tian hadn't created it yet, and even if he did, he wouldn't be able to cultivate it for the time being.

In terms of physical body, Ye Tian had reached the extreme at this moment.

"Finally reached the ultimate of the true spirit, and the physical body has formed the body of the Extreme Dao!"

Ye Tian sighed.

I saw him urging his extreme body, and the extreme light was as dazzling as the sun's flames.

"Hahaha, even if other True Monarchs form the body of the Extreme Dao, the Extreme Dao light is also very dim, and my light is like a flame, I'm afraid that when others see it, they won't think that I am the Extreme Dao light, but think that this is a kind of flame secret art!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Forming the body of the Extreme Dao, his physical strength has reached an incredible level, and his combat power has already surpassed that of the True Ancestor who appeared on the day of the Sunset Sect.

If he had the current combat strength at that time, he could easily slaughter those thirty True Ancestors.

"I can become a half-step True Ancestor now, but I still can't rush. The physical body has just reached the extreme, and the divine power and divine soul have not yet reached the extreme, but under the nourishment of the extreme Dao body, the divine power and divine soul will improve very quickly, and it will not be long before I can reach the limit, and then I can become a half-step true ancestor as long as I complete the breakthrough in the prototype of the Great Dao!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But he still has a small trouble, that is, his Great Dao Prototype is too big, I don't know how many times larger than other people's Great Dao Prototypes, so it is countless times more difficult to turn such a Great Dao Prototype into a complete Great Dao.

Even the Innate Origin Life could not make Ye Tian break the shackles and form a complete endless avenue.

However, Ye Tian also had no intention of using the Innate Origin Life.

In the past, he didn't know the disadvantages of the innate origin life, but now that he has obtained many inheritances from the domain realm, he is also known as the reserve peak master of the Black Wind Mountain, so he naturally knows the disadvantages of the innate origin life.

Once you use the innate origin life to break through to become a half-step true ancestor, it seems that there is no harm, but your own origin has been polluted a little, which is very troublesome in the future, once you can't completely get rid of it, it will be a harm to your own potential, and if you become a Dao Ancestor in the future, it will also cause trouble, and you can't become the most perfect Dao Ancestor.

Therefore, it was impossible for Ye Tian to use the Innate Origin Life Breakthrough to become a half-step True Ancestor, and he would not use it for his own relatives, but he could use it for other True Monarchs of the Human Race.

The other True Monarchs didn't have such worries as him, and they would definitely not mind these flaws.

Ye Tian did not continue the retreat and returned to the human race.

At this time.

Ye Tian found that Xiao Yue's strength had been improved to the initial combat power of the Nine Star Divine Generals, and he was ranked among the top twenty on the Divine Generals list.

"Husband, can I improve my strength?"

Xiao Yue said proudly.

Becoming a nine-star god general is even happier than becoming a true monarch in her previous life.

"Yes, my family is very good!"

Ye Tian praised.

"But Yue'er, it's not good for your strength to be exposed to the ancestral monument, I learned a shielding technique from the inheritance of Black Wind Mountain, which can shield the connection between you and the ancestral monument, and can ensure that your strength continues to improve, and you can't be monitored by the ancestral monument!"

Ye Tian said.

"Then husband, you can use that shielding technique!"

Xiao Yue nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian cast this shielding technique on Xiao Yue, he believed that he was definitely not the only one who performed such a shielding technique, and other forces would definitely have such a god general.

For example, the four transcendent forces, it is easy to send a group of god generals in, and then shield their strength, so that the ancestral monument cannot know.

Not everyone wants to be on the god list, and the god list is actually of little use for the increase in cultivation.

And in the records of the Black Wind Mountain, the people of the Divine Heaven Realm didn't want to be monitored by the Ancestral Monument and the Supreme Treasure similar to the Ancestral Monument, otherwise wouldn't the geniuses within the Middle Triple Heaven and Upper Triple Heaven Sects be exposed?

Therefore, the shielding technique came into being, and a treasure like the Ancestral Tablet was almost like a waste in the Domain Realm or the Divine Heaven Realm, and it was of little use, but the Convergence function would cause the greed of some True Ancestors, and other uses would not attract it at all.

After shielding the ancestral tablet induction, Ye Tian made every effort to cultivate Xiao Yue and raise Xiao Yue to the level of a ten-star god general as soon as possible, but this step was very difficult and difficult, and it would take a long time.

I think that at the beginning, it took him a long time to rise to the level of a ten-star god general, causing other god generals to break through to the realm of the Mandate of Heaven one after another, and he was still stranded in the god general.

As the years passed, Xiao Yue's strength improved rapidly, and she gradually promoted to the mid-stage nine-star god general and the late nine-star god general......

this day.

Ye Tian got a message from the Void Heaven Temple that the battlefield ruins were about to have a god general level competition.

And this competition has caused a sensation among all the big forces, and it is jointly organized by the four transcendent forces and a number of top big forces, and the Void Sky First Pulse is also one of them.

Ye Tian, as the first true monarch of the Void Heaven Palace, naturally knew the inside story for the first time.

The reason why the major forces conducted such a competition in the battlefield relics was because the battlefield relics had a great opportunity, and these opportunities were only suitable for divine generals, and they were of little use to the powerhouses above the Heavenly Mandate Realm.

And this opportunity, any god will want, even at all costs.

"Talent Ancestral Pool!"

"It turned out to be the talent ancestral pool!"

Ye Tian was also excited, this was an incomparably precious treasure land, many times more valuable than his Heaven Splitting God Pillar.

The Talent Ancestral Pool can be said to be a treasure land that the Upper Triple Heaven forces are desperately trying to snatch, and it is recorded in the Black Wind Mountain Classic Space, but it takes a long time for a place like the Talent Ancestral Pool to accumulate a drop of Talent Ancestral Pool liquid.

Therefore, the Talent Ancestral Pool will only be opened once in a long time, and every time the Upper Triple Heaven forces occupy all the places, and those Middle Triple Heaven or Lower Triple Heaven forces don't want to contaminate the Talent Ancestral Pool at all.

"Strange, how could there be a Talent Ancestral Pool in the battlefield ruins? Moreover, how could those Dao Ancestors in the Domain Realm not occupy the Talent Ancestral Pool?"

Ye Tian wondered.

But suddenly, he understood.

The talent ancestral pool is immovable, and the strong people of the Mandate of Heaven and above cannot enter it.

Obviously, the Genius Ancestral Pool was originally owned by the Upper Triple Heaven Forces, not within the sphere of influence of any of the Upper Triple Heavens.

But the domain realm was shattered, and the Dao Ancestors couldn't take care of themselves, causing the Talent Ancestral Pool to become ownerless.

Now, the talent ancestral pool has been discovered by major forces.

That's the process!
